subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Sender of the winds and Cleaver of the dawn! I beseech Thee by Thy Name, the All-Opening, that Thou mayest open before our faces [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا مرسل الاریاح و فالق الاصباح اسئلک باسمک الفتاح بان تفتح علی وجوهنا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
